Interface IQueue

All Known Implementing Classes:
StringQueue
public interface IQueue
Interface that represents a queue that stores String Objects

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    element()
    returns the first element without deleting it (same as peek)
    boolean
    offer(String obj)
    adds a new Object to the end of the queue
    String
    peek()
    returns the first element without deleting it
    String
    poll()
    removes and returns the first element in the queue
    String
    remove()
    removes and returns the first element in the queue (same als poll)

  • Method Details

    • offer

      boolean offer(String obj)
      adds a new Object to the end of the queue
      Parameters:
      obj - the new object that should be included in the queue
      Returns:
      true if the element was successfully added, false if not

    • poll

      String poll()
      removes and returns the first element in the queue
      Returns:
      first element of the queue, null if queue is empty

    • remove

      String remove()
      removes and returns the first element in the queue (same als poll)
      Returns:
      first element

    • peek

      String peek()
      returns the first element without deleting it
      Returns:
      first element of the queue, null if no elements exist

    • element

      String element()
      returns the first element without deleting it (same as peek)
      Returns:
      first element
